layout_and_spacing.scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for inner card padding.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Sidebar navigation (w-64) with a fixed top header (h-16) for project/account selection. The rest is scrollable main content with pt-6 pb-24 px-8.

cards.hover: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#D1A77E] transition-all duration-300 ease-out

buttons.primary: bg-[#364C2E] hover:bg-[#22331D] text-white rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4EBE1] hover:bg-[#EAE3D9] text-[#364C2E] border border-transparent rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[#EAE3D9] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#F4EBE1] text-[#1F2E1B] rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-white border border-[#EAE3D9] rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#364C2E]/20 focus:border-[#364C2E] px-4 py-2 text-[#1F2E1B]

badges.income: bg-[#4B6B40]/10 text-[#4B6B40] px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-semibold
badges.expense: bg-[#D96C4E]/10 text-[#D96C4E] px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-semibold
badges.neutral: bg-[#F4EBE1] text-[#656C5A] px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-semibold

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover states with appropriate contrast.
interactions_and_motion.staggered_entrance: Use framer-motion to stagger list items and dashboard cards on initial load.

images.description: Minimalist vintage wooden desk tray for 'No statements uploaded yet' or 'No transactions found' empty states.
Serene minimalist desk setup for the split-screen login/signup page side banner.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text and 3:1 for large text against background. Use #1F2E1B for text on light backgrounds.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-statement-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS configured with the exact hex codes provided in this JSON.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the main dashboard (4-column grid).
Add 'Work Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' fonts to your global CSS and extend Tailwind config to use them for sans and body classes respectively.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF without context. Cards are #FFFFFF, background is #FDFBF7.
Implement file upload (CSV/PDF) using Shadcn components (Dialog, Input) styled with the Organic & Earthy theme.
For charts (Yearly Overview), use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use the custom colors defined in 'chart_colors'.
Categorization CRUD must be housed in a clean table or bento-grid list. Use badges for income/expense labels.
Apply Framer Motion for subtle entry animations on dashboard cards.
Ensure the sidebar navigation supports selecting different 'projects' or 'accounts' via a top dropdown.
Remember to include data-testid on critical elements like login form, upload button, category select dropdowns, etc.
